extortion.description: Eurotroll B.V is a Netherlands based specialist in custom-made quality control solutions for in vitro diagnostics with a U.S. based production wing. Eurotrol provides high specification, custom-made quality control materials (QC) for the periodic verification of the precision and accuracy of in vitro diagnostics (IVD) analyzers. Our products are produced by an integrated ISO-approved process, from research and development through production, in which only the highest quality materials are used.
